proposal.title: Multi-Source Research Pipeline Expansion
proposal.description: Current research traces are limited to agent_cron, research_arxiv, stability_memory, and deployment_agent. Expand to include: (1) hardware_performance traces (GPU VRAM utilization, thermal monitoring), (2) cost_efficiency traces (token usage per model tier, ROI per skill), (3) user_behavior traces (message patterns, response satisfaction correlation), (4) external_market traces (AI model release cycles, skill marketplace trends). Each new trace source should feed into gradient-deriver.js with appropriate weighting.

notes: Generated via TPG-GRAO-AutoEvolution cron saturation trigger. Targets research-domain gap — current traces cover 6 sources but miss hardware, cost, and market dimensions.
